author: anon-13168fa2
content: Delivered: Added security habit callouts to two earlier chapters. Phase 1 first build: after the verification step, prompts students to test empty titles and bad URLs, directs them to tell the agent to add validation. Phase 2 issue tracker: after build layers, covers validating CLI input and handling missing/corrupted JSON files. Both forward-reference the Security chapter. Light touch - one paragraph each, not full sections.
